findings.description: JSON-first storage was the right call. Loops parse loom outputs without prose-pattern matching across all 22 verbs.
findings.evidence: Zero substrate-parsing flakiness reports across all four phase PRs.

findings.description: TDD discipline visible in git history caught two schema design issues during Phase 1 unit 02 that would have surfaced later.
PANEL-COMPOSITION.md should have been updated for .claude/cli/**/*.ts before Phase 1 started — surfaced as a substrate gap in every Phase 1 PR.
Retro storage is currently a loom tenant; lift to griot CLI when that exists.
findings.evidence: PLAN.md scope explicitly marks this as deferred.

findings.description: Add a panel-composition pre-flight check to /draft-plan when scaffolding new substrate directories.
